lines.speaker: Sir Pelleas
lines.text: Greetings to the court of King Arthur!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello. I'm looking for a quest. Who should I talk to?

lines.speaker: Sir Pelleas
lines.text: King Arthur will let you know. I believe he has a quest at the moment.

lines.speaker: Sir Pelleas
lines.text: Greetings to the court of King Arthur!

lines.speaker: Sir Pelleas
lines.text: You are a very talented Knight indeed to have freed Merlin so quickly. You have all of our gratitude.

lines.speaker: Sir Pelleas
lines.text: Greetings to the court of King Arthur!

lines.speaker: Sir Pelleas
lines.text: I am proud to have you as a member of the Round Table.
